history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a three-panel collage showing game-style character screens and colorful character artwork.

Main Subject:
A digital game interface fills the middle and lower portions, with character selection/profile panels on a blue UI background, alongside stylized fantasy sci‑fi character artwork above and below.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors as a screen capture or game menu layout, with bright neon lighting and graphic effects typical of a video game. The top panel shows a dark, futuristic environment background with glowing green energy; the middle and lower panels show UI screens with character models on a blue-to-white fantasy backdrop.

Visual Details:
At the top, a humanoid, armored character with a green visor and angular helmet is shown in three-quarter view, facing left. The armor is predominantly dark with bright green glowing highlights, and green energy shapes flare around the character. A large mechanical weapon or device extends from the left side of the frame toward the center, with gold-toned mechanical parts and circular details. The lighting is dramatic, with strong green glow and sharp, high-contrast highlights.
In the middle, a large blue UI panel labeled “Profil” appears near the top-left. The interface includes menu items down the left side (with “Info,” “Riwayat Match,” “Hero,” “Skin,” “Honor,” “Reputasi,” and “Social” visible). In the center-left there are rows of small icons, badge-like symbols, and text elements, including a “HLL WARRIORS” label and a “Da Quo 117 Rekanbu” line, with additional numeric values and arrows indicating selection. On the right side, a full-body female character stands on a blue, starry or textured ground, wearing a light, flowing outfit with wing-like or cape-like elements and glowing accents; her hair is pink with pale highlights.
In the lower middle panel, another blue UI screen shows a similar left-side menu list and a different highlighted character entry, with a small round avatar and multiple small emblem icons across the bottom area of the panel. On the right side, another full-body character model appears in pale blue-white lighting, with a translucent, flowing outfit and a faint glow around the figure.
At the very bottom, a separate piece of fantasy illustration shows two characters in a dynamic pose: one humanoid figure with short blond hair and a dark, high-tech outfit stands in the foreground, while a second character with bright red hair and a light-colored outfit appears beside or behind them. Bright swirling energy effects, feathers or wing-like shapes, and floating particles fill the background in vivid pink, blue, and white.

Visible Text:
Profil
Info
Riwayat Match
Hero
Skin
Honor
Reputasi
Social
Pengaturan
Tunjukkan ikonori tambahan
Da Quo 117 Rekanbu
HLL WARRIORS
Da Quo 117 Rekanbu
No important visible text detected (for any other exact labels beyond those listed above)

Practical Summary:
The image shows stylized game character artwork at the top and bottom, and two blue profile-style UI panels in the middle. The middle panels display menu items and character models, with multiple icons, arrows, and numeric/stat-like elements arranged around the characters.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

- If you upload a higher-resolution crop of the left sidebar and the two profile sections (especially the usernames and the “Honor/Reputasi/Sosial” rows), I can extract the missing text more accurately.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
